PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; fi

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(age|key)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Encrypted/key files should not be edited directly' && exit 1; fi
PreToolUse.description: Block edits to encrypted and key files
